'''Ihu Niopua''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who served in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Approximately one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], he was quoted on the [[HoloNet News and Entertainment|HNE]] evening news praising the efforts of the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] in disrupting a terrorist network operating on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In fact, it was mostly the work of [[Kal Skirata]] and his [[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commandos]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1stm}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
